mcp_server.name: playwright
mcp_server.note: Runs locally via npx, not inside Docker

capabilities.navigate: Open any URL in a real browser
capabilities.snapshot: Get accessibility tree of current page

use_cases: Scrape per-post analytics not available via API
Engage with comments on any platform
Scrape competitor posts and engagement data
auth_note: Claude opens a visible browser. You log in manually once. Cookies persist for the session.
